sessions.title: Baseline Strength Test
sessions.prompt: Complete the baseline test and record results honestly. This establishes your starting point for the Strength lane.
sessions.deliverable: Submit mile time and max reps for each exercise.
sessions.coachNote: Session 40 repeats this exact test to measure progress.

sessions.title: Iron Foundation I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout with control and honest effort.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note which movement felt strongest.
sessions.coachNote: Feel the last 3 reps. That’s where discipline shows.

sessions.title: Iron Foundation II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and focus on clean reps.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note which movement felt weakest.
sessions.coachNote: Clean reps first. Don’t chase ugly weight.

sessions.title: Explosive Power I
sessions.prompt: Train speed and explosion with clean mechanics and full intent.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best movement and where you felt fastest.
sessions.coachNote: Fast and clean. No sloppy power.

sessions.title: Iron Foundation III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and keep the last reps disciplined.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and best completed lift.
sessions.coachNote: Earn the last reps. No shortcuts under fatigue.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned full-body HIIT circuit with steady pace and clean movement.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds completed and hardest movement.
sessions.coachNote: Don’t sprint the first round and die early.

sessions.title: Iron Foundation IV
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and focus on full range and posture.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note one form correction.
sessions.coachNote: Full range. Own the position.

sessions.title: Explosive Power II
sessions.prompt: Train power output with short bursts and strong recovery between efforts.
sessions.deliverable: Log your strongest movement and what improved from last power session.
sessions.coachNote: Explode hard. Recover with discipline.

sessions.title: Iron Build I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and push the final work sets with control.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and hardest exercise.
sessions.coachNote: Pressure the last sets. Stay clean.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and maintain pace from start to finish.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and where your pace broke.
sessions.coachNote: Hold your pace. Don’t let fatigue own the middle.

sessions.title: Iron Build II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and stay disciplined through the final sets.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note one improvement.
sessions.coachNote: Discipline shows when the set gets ugly.

sessions.title: Explosive Power III
sessions.prompt: Train explosive output and focus on fast intent, not sloppy reps.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best explosive movement and note what felt most athletic.
sessions.coachNote: Fast intent. No wasted reps.

sessions.title: Iron Build III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and hold position under fatigue.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note the most demanding lift.
sessions.coachNote: Posture is part of strength.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and keep transitions tight.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and hardest transition.
sessions.coachNote: Transitions matter. Don’t bleed time.

sessions.title: Iron Build IV
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout with full effort and clean posture.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and one cue that helped.
sessions.coachNote: Own the position before you chase load.

sessions.title: Explosive Power IV
sessions.prompt: Train explosiveness with crisp movement and aggressive intent.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best movement and where your speed dropped.
sessions.coachNote: Speed drops before effort admits it.

sessions.title: Iron Strength I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and attack the working sets with discipline.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note which lift challenged you most.
sessions.coachNote: Attack the set. Respect the form.

sessions.title: Iron Strength II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and focus on tension and control.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note one technical win.
sessions.coachNote: Control the weight. Don’t let it control you.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT IV
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and hold effort across every round.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and the point where fatigue hit.
sessions.coachNote: Fatigue tells the truth. Stay working.

sessions.title: Explosive Power V
sessions.prompt: Train power with full intent and honest rest between rounds.
sessions.deliverable: Log your strongest explosive movement and note one improvement.
sessions.coachNote: Rest with purpose. Explode on command.

sessions.title: Iron Strength III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and keep quality high through the final reps.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note where form got tested.
sessions.coachNote: When form gets tested, discipline gets exposed.

sessions.title: Iron Strength IV
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and stay aggressive but controlled.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note the hardest working set.
sessions.coachNote: Aggressive is good. Sloppy is not.

sessions.title: Explosive Power VI
sessions.prompt: Train speed and power with clean posture and sharp effort.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best movement and note what felt most explosive.
sessions.coachNote: Posture carries power.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT V
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and keep consistent pace through the full circuit.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and note which movement slowed you down.
sessions.coachNote: Consistency wins more than hype.

sessions.title: Iron Pressure I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and keep your last 3 reps disciplined.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note one moment you wanted to quit.
sessions.coachNote: The last 3 reps tell the truth.

sessions.title: Iron Pressure II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and focus on posture under fatigue.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and the movement that exposed weakness.
sessions.coachNote: Weakness shows when posture slips.

sessions.title: Explosive Power VII
sessions.prompt: Train power under control and focus on sharp effort every round.
sessions.deliverable: Log your strongest movement and what changed from the last explosive day.
sessions.coachNote: Power without control leaks everywhere.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT VI
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session with clean movement and honest pace.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and the movement that broke your rhythm.
sessions.coachNote: Rhythm breaks before effort admits it.

sessions.title: Iron Pressure III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and stay disciplined through fatigue.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note one technical correction.
sessions.coachNote: Fatigue is not permission to get lazy.

sessions.title: Iron Pressure IV
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and keep rep quality high when tired.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note your strongest movement.
sessions.coachNote: Quality is the test when you’re tired.

sessions.title: Explosive Power VIII
sessions.prompt: Train short-burst power and recover with discipline between rounds.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best explosive movement and where your power faded.
sessions.coachNote: Recovery is part of performance.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT VII
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and hold pace as long as possible.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and the point where pace dropped.
sessions.coachNote: Know where you broke. That’s where you train next.

sessions.title: Iron Peak I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and attack the top sets with control.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note your best lift of the day.
sessions.coachNote: Peak with control, not ego.

sessions.title: Iron Peak II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned Iron workout and keep technical discipline under pressure.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and the hardest movement of the session.
sessions.coachNote: Pressure should sharpen technique, not erase it.

sessions.title: Explosive Power IX
sessions.prompt: Train explosive effort and focus on fast, clean movement.
sessions.deliverable: Log your strongest explosive movement and note one improvement.
sessions.coachNote: Fast is good. Fast and clean is better.

sessions.title: Remote HIIT VIII
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned HIIT session and finish with discipline.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and which movement hurt your finish.
sessions.coachNote: The finish tells the truth.

sessions.title: Performance Lead-In I
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned strength session and focus on speed, posture, and composure.
sessions.deliverable: Log your top working set and note what feels stronger now than Session 1.
sessions.coachNote: Feel the difference. Don’t just survive the work.

sessions.title: Performance Lead-In II
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned session and measure how well you hold effort under fatigue.
sessions.deliverable: Log total rounds and what improved most since the start.
sessions.coachNote: Progress shows up when fatigue no longer runs the session.

sessions.title: Performance Lead-In III
sessions.prompt: Complete the assigned strength session and prepare for the retest with full effort.
sessions.deliverable: Log your best movement and one clear sign of progress.
sessions.coachNote: See the progress clearly before the retest.

sessions.title: Baseline Retest
sessions.prompt: Repeat the exact baseline test from Session 1 and compare your results.
sessions.deliverable: Submit mile time and max reps again.
sessions.coachNote: Compare results with Session 1.
